Who's Who in Riemann Hypothesis Research

Who's Who in Riemann Hypothesis Research

A ranked directory of researchers active on the Riemann hypothesis. Coming soon.

This is a forthcoming sister site to Who's Who in Goldbach Research. It will rank researchers active on the Riemann hypothesis and the zeros of the zeta and L-functions, built from the same three open data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, and zbMATH Open, merged into a single composite ranking.

The directory is being compiled now. In the meantime, the Goldbach edition shows what this will look like: wwigr.org.

Questions, corrections, or want to be notified at launch? Email admin@wwirh.org.

An independent, non-commercial project. Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open.
